description: Router finds old-pool stale (metadata_dir missing). First encounter for this pool in this session.
assertion: old-pool discovered as stale; session_warned_pools is empty; no warning yet shown

description: old-pool cleaned up; warning shown for first time; session marker set for old-pool.
assertion: warning_shown is true; session_marker_set is true; old-pool added to session_warned_pools

description: Old-pool no longer in index (already removed). A different pool 'other-pool' is found stale. Session marker for old-pool has no effect here.
assertion: old-pool absent from index; other-pool is now found stale; old-pool session marker present but does not affect other-pool

description: other-pool cleaned up; warning shown for other-pool (separate pool = separate warning). Session marker set for other-pool.
assertion: warning_shown is true for other-pool; other-pool added to session_warned_pools; both pools now in session_warned_pools

description: Hypothetical re-encounter: old-pool appears again in index. Session marker for old-pool suppresses the duplicate warning.
assertion: warning_shown is false; suppressed_by_session_marker is true; session marker prevents duplicate warning for old-pool
